description: Clear definition of what constitutes Confidential Information
Explicit obligations to protect and not disclose information
Agreement duration and survival period for obligations
Obligation to return or destroy confidential materials on request
Applicable law and jurisdiction
Clause confirming no IP licence is granted by disclosure
Standard exceptions including public domain and prior knowledge
Process for resolving disagreements
Detailed description of in-scope and out-of-scope work
Formal deliverables with measurable acceptance criteria
Total value and payment schedule and invoice terms
Clear ownership of custom IP and licence grants for background IP
GDPR compliance and DPA reference and data handling obligations
Named roles for both parties with explicit accountabilities
Formal change request process for scope or timeline or budget changes
Liability cap and exclusion of consequential damages
Termination for convenience and for cause with notice periods
Warranty period and remedy obligations for non-conforming deliverables
Protection for unforeseeable events beyond parties control
Applicable law and dispute resolution mechanism
Employer and employee identification with role and start date
Base salary and bonus structure and payment frequency
Standard hours and overtime policy and remote work conditions
Assignment of IP created during employment to employer
Obligations to protect employer confidential information
Notice periods for resignation and dismissal and severance terms
Post-employment restrictions on competitive activity
Health insurance and pension and vacation entitlement
Duration and conditions of probationary period
Applicable employment law and jurisdiction
